title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 70.503 - Sovereign immunity to apply
text:
70.503.  Sovereign immunity to apply. — The provisions of sections 537.600 to 537.650 shall apply to the metropolitan culture district and to the Missouri members of the metropolitan culture district commission established in section 70.500.
(L. 1993 H.B. 759 & 772 § 2)
